title: Staff Backend Engineer (Implementation and Platform Configuration)

fit_evaluation.summary: Exceptional match. You exceed core requirements by 3x in experience, possess exact tech stack (Go, Python, PostgreSQL, GCP, Kubernetes), and uniquely address their agentic AI coding requirement.

key_strengths: Go expertise - owned production systems at scale on GCP (Equifax)
Python proficiency - demonstrated across multiple roles
Kubernetes and Docker - designed containerized systems (Optilogic)
GCP experience - exact platform match for their infrastructure
Async messaging patterns (RabbitMQ, RocketMQ at Nu Skin)
Leadership experience - led backend teams for 2+ years
Remote work expertise - 3+ years distributed teams (Equifax, Nu Skin)
Agentic AI coding - built AI agents and MCP integrations (UNIQUE)
Insurance domain familiarity - managed claims data at ActiveCare
key_gaps: No Java experience (explicitly marked as 'nice to have' in job posting)
Limited direct Drools rules engine experience (learnable with strong Java fundamentals)
No current life insurance platform-specific experience (but demonstrated ability to learn domains quickly)

preferred_requirements.kubernetes_gcp: ✓ Owned services on GCP Kubernetes (exact match)

bonus_requirements.agentic_ai_coding: ✓ Built AI agents and MCP integrations (EXCEEDS expectation)

tailored_resume_markdown.highlights: Go and distributed systems expertise, GCP experience, team leadership, agentic AI work

cover_letter_markdown.themes: Backend scale, distributed systems, team leadership, agentic AI, remote collaboration

next_steps.action: Review the tailored resume (DOCX) to ensure all technical details are current and accurate
Review the cover letter for tone and ensure it resonates with your voice
Submit application via Ashby (direct apply enabled) using resume-staff-backend-engineer.docx
Optional: Send cover letter via email if recruiting contact becomes available

application_strategy.strength: Exceptional technical fit - Go, Python, PostgreSQL, GCP, Kubernetes all match exactly
application_strategy.differentiation: Your agentic AI work directly addresses their 'proven track record with Agentic AI coding' requirement - few candidates will have this
application_strategy.tone: Confident but not arrogant - acknowledge Bestow's mission and demonstrate genuine interest in modernizing insurance infrastructure
application_strategy.messaging: Position yourself as someone who can both contribute immediately (exact tech stack) and grow into longer-term technical leadership
application_strategy.risk_mitigation: Address Java gap proactively if asked - your strong fundamentals and track record of learning quickly makes this non-issue

metadata.job_coach_status: Application materials complete - ready to submit
